title: Quest begins: Lansing
body: Gas, snacks, charger. I-94 W toward Chicago, then I-80 W — main west line.

title: Cross into Indiana
body: I-94 toward Chicago. Watch tolls and lane closures; Illinois traffic builds ahead.

title: Chicago merge
body: Traffic thickens. Follow road signs for I-80 W if they disagree with the phone.

title: Iowa
body: Long straights. Top off fuel before thin rural stretches.

title: Nebraska
body: Open miles. Crosswinds near trucks; short breaks if you're solo.

title: Wyoming
body: Elevation and gusts. Both hands in wind; pull off if it's bad.

title: Utah approach
body: I-80 into the Wasatch Front. Bluffdale sits south of SLC. Kilby Block Party is in Salt Lake — lock parking or transit before you roll in.

title: Bluffdale
body: Check in before Kilby (May 15–17). Sleep, water, then festival.
